title: Karl-Emil Bendtsen
text: Hi! I am a PhD student at the Department of Political Science at the University of Copenhagen. My research is mainly on bureaucracy, discretion, policy uptake, legal complexity, digitalization and the use of AI in public administrations and politics. I sometimes also do reserach on electoral systems and local politics.

title: Karl-Emil Bendtsen
text:

Increasing take-up of social benefits: a meta-analysis of field experiments (Journal of Policy Analysis and Managment)
Public Administration Beyond Public Administration Journals with Asmus Leth Olsen & Paul van Leeuwen. (PS: Political Science and Politics)
